sglang.title: [AMD] Update AMD Nightly Test checkout mechanism
sglang.author: yctseng0211
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
nightly-test-amd*.yml currently checks out ${{ inputs.ref || github.ref }}. github.ref is a moving pointer (e.g. refs/heads/main), so actions/checkout resolves it at checkout time — not at workflow trigger time. As a result, "Re-run failed jobs" silently picks up a newer main HEAD instead

In PD disaggregation with NSA + MTP, only the target model's NSA state buffers are registered for transfer. The draft model's NSATokenToKVPool buffers are never appended to kv_args, so the MTP layer's index/KV state is not sent from prefill to decode, causing wrong speculative decoding re

vllm.title: [Bugfix] BailingMoeV2.5: rotate full qk_rope_head_dim in MLA RoPE
vllm.author: ZJY0516
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
BailingMoeV25MLAAttention builds its RoPE by passing the model's rope_parameters
(which includes partial_rotary_factor=0.5) into get_rope together with
head_size=qk_rope_head_dim=64. get_rope then computes
rotary_dim = int(64 * 0.5) = 32, so only half of the rope head dimensions are
rotated

vllm.title: [Feat] CPU fp8 attn for AMX/AVX-512
vllm.author: tianmu-li
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Add FP8 E4M3 and E5M2 KV cache quantization support to the CPU attention backend (x86 AVX-512 / Intel AMX paths). Removes the hard error and silent cache_dtype downgrade in CpuPlatform that previously blocked FP8 KV cache on CPU entirely.
Key design points

Two new C++ kernels: cpu_attn_resh

vllm.title: [ROCm] Use quant_dtype in per_token_quant instead of hardcoded FP8
vllm.author: Bortlesboat
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
_rocm_aiter_per_token_quant_impl and its fake both accept quant_dtype (which can be torch.int8 or FP8_DTYPE per the assert), but hardcode FP8_DTYPE for the output tensor allocation. This means passing torch.int8 would still get an FP8 tensor back.
Simple fix: use quant_dtype instead of FP8_DTYPE for

Defaults to temperature=0.0 to enforce greedy rather than the 0.001 that BFCL uses.

#39801 accidentally switched off rocm_aiter_fused_moe for all quark-quantized W4A4 models, forcing them to use the MXFP4.Emulation backend instead. The correct list should be W4A16, W4A8 and W4A4, see: https://github.com/ROCm/aiter/blob/main/csrc/ck_gemm_moe_2stages_codegen/gen_instances.py#

vllm.title: [BUG] Two phase pause to prevent deadlock
vllm.author: hao-aaron
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Two-Phase Pause Protocol for DP Engines
Motivation
With data-parallel (DP) engines, returning from pause does not guarantee that engines stay paused. After pause_scheduler returns, a stale START_DP_WAVE message can re-activate an engine that was supposed to be idle. If a caller then performs a colle

This PR introduces two opt-in environment variables that provide finer control over this path:

vllm.title: [DSv4] Use `cvt` PTX for FP32->FP4 conversion

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix persistent_topk cooperative deadlock at TopK=1024
vllm.author: zyongye
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Top issue: for topk=1024 and MTP=1, this kernel will deadline since there's no enough SMs to launch the grid and since each kernel is persistent, no kernel will finish. Hence the process will hang.
Query occupancy for the actual <TopK, vec_size> instantiation being launched, reserve one CTA

useful for proxy/gateway scenarios where the actual model is served but differen
